1.title: JWT Token Validation Failure
1.description: 401 Unauthorized errors spiking on /api/v2/orders. 35% of requests affected.

2.title: API Gateway → Payment-Service 503 Errors
2.description: Upstream connection timeout. Payment-Service pod memory at 95%, connection pool saturated.

3.title: High CPU Usage on db-node-01
3.description: CPU usage on db-node-01 exceeded 85% for 15 minutes.

8.sre_experience: Payment Gateway timeout was causing cascade failures. We rolled back PR #4910 and reverted timeout to 500ms.
8.solution_applied: Rollback PR #4910, revert payment timeout config.

9.sre_experience: Redis connection leak caused OOM on payment pods. Fixed by closing idle connections after 30s.
9.solution_applied: Updated Redis pool config: IDLE_TIMEOUT=30s, MAX_CONNECTIONS=100.

10.sre_experience: JWT key rotation broke auth for 20 min. Root cause: key cache TTL was 24h. Changed to 5m.
10.solution_applied: Reduced JWT key cache TTL to 5m, added /admin/flush-keys endpoint.

13.text: I detected a JWT token validation failure impacting 35% of API requests. Traced to stale signing key cache.

16.text: Based on the active DB CPU issue, I have generated a step-by-step remediation recommendation.

18.text: I detected a JWT token validation failure impacting 35% of API requests. I've traced the root cause to a stale signing key cache. Let me walk you through the Detection, Reasoning, and Remediation steps.

20.text: I detected a JWT token validation failure impacting 35% of API requests. I've traced the root cause to a stale signing key cache. Let me walk you through the Detection, Reasoning, and Remediation steps.
